name: backtest-skill
description: TradingView backtesting workflow skill for Pine, Strategy Tester, browser operation, result audit, and local backtest migration.

interface.shortDescription: Pine, Strategy Tester, and local backtest workflows.
interface.longDescription: Generate and review Pine Script strategies, guide or automate TradingView Strategy Tester runs, audit backtest quality, produce webhook payloads, and plan migration to local Python backtesting frameworks.
defaultPrompt: Use $tradingview-backtest to build and test this strategy idea.
Use $tradingview-backtest to audit this Pine strategy.
Use $tradingview-backtest to migrate this backtest to Python.
